bird.name: 圣马林蜂鸟
bird.summary: 圣马林蜂鸟（台湾作聖塔馬塔林星蜂鳥，学名：Chaetocercus astreans），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 圣马林蜂鸟体重约2克，翼长约33.7毫米，嘴峰长约15.7毫米，喙宽度约1.2毫米，喙厚度约1.3毫米，跗蹠长约4毫米，尾长约16毫米。圣马林蜂鸟在其分布区内为留…

relations.subject: 圣马林蜂鸟
relations.evidence: It inhabits the edges of montane forest, semi-open woodlands, and coffee plantations, and occasionally visits the lower parts of the páramo
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 圣马林蜂鸟
relations.evidence: Though it has a limited range and its population size is unknown, the latter is believed to be stable. It is considered locally common and readily accepts some human-altered landscapes like coffee plantations, though some of its natural habitat is under threat of deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
